Name: -1_taste_good_music_think
Representative_Docs: ['I think taste depends on each person. Someone who has good taste in music is my sister who will listen to it, regardless of who thinks it is good or not.', 'I think they have good taste because they think ahead of time and research about products before they buy them. Another person who I think has good taste in music, enjoys similar music to me and dislikes some of the same.', 'My wife is having good taste, she get good clothes for me and for my family. Name: 0_good_taste_clothes_look
Representative_Docs: ['This person has good taste because they can dress in style all the time.  Their clothes match and fits nicely.  Their shoes and watch are a good complement to their clothes.', 'I think my cousin has good taste. He buys and wears expensive clothes and they look very good on him. It makes him look like a model.', 'A friend of mine has very good taste in clothes. They wear things that fit their body and style, and they look great.']

Name: 1_person_good_taste_things
Representative_Docs: ['A person with good taste is someone who enjoys content that is understandably popular, enjoyable, or has good merit. There are guilty pleasures so they are probably not liked but the individual just enjoys it, or a group of people see the flaws but they still enjoy it. This is subjective, good taste is subjective.', "Really anyone who puts time into wanting to create something that speaks to and is generally perceived as 'good' by members of a specific audience. Taste is largely subjective, but also dependent upon the audience. So whereas one audience might perceive a MAGA hat as cheap and distasteful, another audience might look at it as extremely tasteful. If we're looking for a specific person here, I would say that Steve Jobs had good taste. He was able to create things that appealed to a lot of people such that they would use them, find them convenient, and pay money for them. I would call that tasteful in addition to successful.", "I think someone in then know who has been around with experience tends to have good taste. It is always depends a lot on a person character. What someone see as good taste, someone else won't. A person who goes out of their way to impress usually has good taste."]

Name: 2_taste_good_friend_movies
Representative_Docs: ['I think my best friend has good taste because we share the same interests and like the same things.', "I think that my best friend has good taste in movies because we both enjoy the same kinds of movies. For example, we both love marvel movies so I'd say she has good taste.", 'I think majority of my close friends have good taste, but especially my best friend. This is because we like the same things, therefore her taste is very similar to my taste.']
